title: CAPF Bill introduced in parliament; allows Centre to override court orders on recruitment through notifications
description: The Central government has introduced the Central Armed Police Forces (General Administration) Bill, 2026, which seeks to grant the executive sweeping powers to regulate the service conditions of Group A officers.Introduced by Minister of Home Affairs and Cooperation Amit Shah, the law will apply to the Central Reserve Police Force (CRPF), the Border Security Force (BSF), the Central Industrial Security Force (CISF), the Indo-Tibetan Border Police (ITBP) and the Sashastra Seema Bal (SSB).It allo
